# 最后尝试：直接用搜索引擎API
try:
    # 尝试DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API
    ddg_url = "https://api.duckduckgo.com/"
    params = {"q": "TKO Group acquire Endeavor UFC", "format": "json", "no_html": 1}
    resp = requests.get(ddg_url, params=params, timeout=10)
    print("DuckDuckGo:", resp.status_code)
    data = resp.json()
    print("Answer:", data.get("Answer", "N/A"))
    print("Abstract:", data.get("AbstractText", "N/A")[:500])
except Exception as e:
    print("DDG Error:", e)

# 打印已知事实
print("\n=== 已知交易信息 ===")
print("TKO Group Holdings由UFC和WWE合并而成")
print("Endeavor曾持有UFC股权")
```
